subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1919
subcodes.first_line: To bathe oneself is a great bounty. Near the army barracks in ‘Akka there existed a public bath which was in a state of ruin
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمام در حقیقت نعمت بزرگی است در رومیلی در تمام خانهها حمام و آب موجود بود
subcodes.subjects: @cleanliness and refinement, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions
